zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Chesney於1115年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可霍斯福德時，他的父親Baron Walter de Chesney31歲，母親Eve de Broc26歲。他於1160年之前與Gilla結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1174年9月29日在英國英格蘭艾可哈爾斯亞德享年59歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chesney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Antrim, Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh, see McChesney .
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Chaney  , a cognate of 3 below.
French: topographic name for someone who lived by or in an oak wood, from Old French chesnai ‘oak grove’ (from chesne ‘oak’). Compare Cheney 2.

variants.name: McChesney
meanings: Scottish (Galloway) and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac (an) tSasanaigh ‘son of the Saxon (i.e. the Englishman)’. The spelling seems to represent Mac Shasanaigh, to be pronounced originally as McHasney, rather than the English spelling ch.

variants.name: Chestnut
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire) and northern Irish: altered form of Chesney , shortened from McChesney . Its assimilation to the English word chestnut is due to folk etymology, the word itself being first recorded in 1519. The surname was probably taken to Ireland at the time of the 17th-century Plantation of Ulster.
English (Norfolk): probably a variant of Chestney (see Chaney ), altered by folk etymological association with the word chestnut.

variants.name: Chesna
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Chesney  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Chesney was born in 1115, in Horsford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Baron Walter de Chesney, was 31 and his mother, Eve de Broc, was 26. He married Gilla before 1160. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 29 September 1174, in Halstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Chesney est né en 1115, à Horsford, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Baron Walter de Chesney, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Eve de Broc, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Gilla avant 1160. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1174, à Halstead, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Chesney 1115 in Horsford, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Walter de Chesney 31 und seine Mutter Eve de Broc 26. Er hat vor 1160 Gilla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. September 1174 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Halstead, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Chesney è nato il nel 1115 nel Horsford, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Baron Walter de Chesney, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Eve de Broc, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Gilla prima del 1160. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 29 settembre 1174, nel Halstead, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Chesneyが1115年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクホールスフォードで生まれた時，父Baron Walter de Chesneyは31歳，母Eve de Brocは26歳であった。1160年以前にGillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1174年9月29日にイギリスイギリスエセックスハルステアドで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Chesney(이)가 1115년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 호르스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Walter de Chesney(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Eve de Broc(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1160년 이전 Gilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1174년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 할스테아드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Chesney nasceu em 1115, em Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Baron Walter de Chesney, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Eve de Broc, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Gilla antes 1160. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1174, em Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Chesney родился в 1115 г. в местности хаурсфорд, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Baron Walter de Chesney было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Eve de Broc, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Gilla перед 1160 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 29 сентября 1174 г. в местности холстид, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Chesney nació en 1115, en Horsford, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Baron Walter de Chesney, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Eve de Broc, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gilla antes de 1160. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1174, en Halstead, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
